description: Yugabyte provides distributed SQL database products including the open source YugabyteDB engine, the self-managed YugabyteDB Anywhere control plane, and the fully managed YugabyteDB Aeon service. These products are used to run and manage YugabyteDB database clusters across local, cloud, and hybrid environments.
summary: Yugabyte exposes two documented management REST APIs (YugabyteDB Aeon and YugabyteDB Anywhere) plus three CLIs: `ybm`, `yba`, and the local `yugabyted` utility; the documented management surfaces use an Aeon API key or an Anywhere API token.
